summary: A globe/map visualization project with 3D/2D toggle, world travel, time zone, and global control features. UI fixes in progress: moving buttons to upper left, popups to right side, restoring 3D/2D toggles, and removing bottom-left time display.
architectural_notes: UI buttons (World Travel, Time Zone, Global Control) should be positioned in the upper left
Popup boxes for World Travel, Time Zone, and Global Control should appear on the right side
3D/2D toggle buttons must be present in the UI
No time display in the bottom left

existing_features.title: Move the 'World Travel', 'Time Zone', and 'Global Control' buttons back to the upper-left area of the map/globe explorer UI (LocationMapExplorer.tsx), restoring their original positioning from version 1164.
When clicking the 'World Travel', 'Time Zone', or 'Global Control' buttons, the popup/panel that appears must open on the right side of the screen instead of the left side.

Restore the 3D and 2D toggle buttons in LocationMapExplorer.tsx that were present in version 1164 but are currently missing. Re-add them in their original location and with their original functionality for switching between 3D globe and 2D map views.
Remove the local time display that is currently shown in the bottom-left area of the explorer UI (LocationMapExplorer.tsx).
